corrections.text: The article quotes the arXiv preprint as saying the work "establishes exciton-polariton condensates as a platform for studying nonequilibrium quantum systems." That phrasing is a paraphrase. The arXiv abstract (2506.15521) actually reads: "these results establish exciton-polariton condensates as a robust experimental platform for exploring 2D nonequilibrium universality quantitatively." The substance is unchanged but the quoted text is not verbatim.
